title: HR copilot for candidate screening
summary: Recruiting drafts interview notes and shortlist rationales with AI support before a human decides.
purpose: HR prepares interview summaries and shortlist recommendations for open roles.

workflow.summary: Candidate notes are exported from ATS, summarised with AI, and then reviewed by a recruiter.

triggers: Recruiter requests a summary for hiring review
steps: Recruiter exports structured notes from ATS
AI drafts candidate summary and open questions
Recruiter edits the summary and decides whether to escalate
humansInLoop: Hiring lead signs off before a candidate is rejected
risks: Sensitive personal data copied into prompts
controls: Prompt excludes protected attributes unless legally required
Recruiter training and quarterly audit of sample cases
